name: Acrobatics
effect: This move's power is doubled if the user isn't holding an item.

name: Aerial Ace
effect: This move never misses.

name: Aqua Cutter
effect: This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

name: Aqua Step
effect: Boosts the user's Speed stat by 1 stage.

name: Assurance
effect: This move's power is doubled if the target has already taken damage during the turn this move is used.

name: Aura Wheel
effect: Boosts the user's Speed stat by 1 stage. This move's type depends on Morpeko's form.

name: Avalanche
effect: This move's power is doubled if the target has already dealt damage to the user with a move in the same turn.

name: Axe Kick
effect: Has a 30% chance of confusing the target. If this move misses or fails, the user takes damage equal to 1/2 of its max HP.

name: Barb Barrage
effect: Has a 50% chance of poisoning the target. This move's power is doubled if the target is poisoned or badly poisoned.

name: Beak Blast
effect: If the user is hit by a contact move before it uses this move, the attacker will be burned.

name: Beat Up
effect: The target is attacked as many times as the number of Pokémon in the user's party. Pokémon that have fainted or have a status condition are not counted. This move's power is calculated based on the Attack stats of the party Pokémon.

name: Bind
effect: Gives the target the Bound status, where the Pokémon takes 1/8 damage of its max HP at the end of every turn and it cannot switch out.

name: Bite
effect: Has a 30% chance of making the target flinch.

name: Bitter Blade
effect: The user's HP is restored by 1/20f the damage dealt by this move.

name: Blaze Kick
effect: Has a 10% chance of burning the target. This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

name: Body Press
effect: The damage dealt by this move is calculated using the user's Defense stat instead of its Attack stat.

name: Body Slam
effect: Has a 30% chance of paralyzing the target. If the target has the Minimized status, this move’s power is doubled and it will be sure to hit.

name: Bone Rush
effect: The user attacks 2 to 5 times in a row.

name: Bounce
effect: The user gains the Sky-High status on the turn this move is used, where the Pokémon cannot be hit my most moves and is unaffected by terrain, then attacks on the following turn. This move has a 30% chance of paralyzing the target.

name: Brave Bird
effect: The user takes 1/3 of the damage dealt by this move.

name: Breaking Swipe
effect: Lowers targets' Attack stats by 1 stage.

name: Brick Break

name: Bug Bite
effect: If the target is holding a Berry, the user eats that Berry and gains its effect.

name: Bulldoze
effect: Lowers targets’ Speed stats by 1 stage. When Grassy Terrain is active, this move’s power is halved.

name: Bullet Seed
effect: The user attacks 2 to 5 times in a row.

name: Ceaseless Edge
effect: Gives the opponent's side the Spikes status, where Pokémon that are not Flying-types or have the Levitate ability that switch into battle will take damage equal to 1/8 of their max HP and will increase with each instance up to three times.

name: Circle Throw
effect: If there are other Pokémon in the target's party that can switch into battle, the target is forced to switch out of battle and is replaced by one of those Pokémon at random.

name: Close Combat
effect: Lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats by 1 stage.

name: Comeuppance
effect: The user retaliates to deal 150% of the damage it took from an opponent's move during the turn this move is used.

name: Counter
effect: The user retaliates to deal double the damage it took from an opponent’s physical move during the turn this move is used.

effect: f the user is not already holding an item, it steals the target's held item.
